segments.text: Thirty years back, thirty years when Sahasrara was open I found darkness all over.
People were so ignorant they had no awareness what to have find of course
I found they wanted to find something that was unknown, but didn't know what was unknown
– and there were extremely ignorant people about themselves
their surroundings
the aim of life.
I didn't know how to start the topic with her.
When Sahasrara was opened,
i thought of trying Self-realization only on one lady
She is an old lady and there's another lady who also started coming
This old lady got realization
And then the another lady was much younger, she told Me that
She gets fits and She get possessed.
Oh My God! I said how will i give her realization?
But somehow She got cured very fast
& She also caught Her realization
It's a Very unknown knowledge
Also human beings in their ego do not want to accept
that they are not yet complete,
and have to have their realization.
Also the style of life was such
as there had no time for themselves
I found it very difficult
To convince people
That you must take your Self-realization
Because
They thought
It is something imaginary
And it's farfetched
And they only believed in gurus who would say, all right do this much of ritual karma
can't.
That's it and there were doing all kinds rituals with the kind guidance from their
gurus without knowing that you have to first know yourself which is said by
All the great incarnations, all the saints.
Clearly it is not that It was only My idea
That people should get their Self-realization
but IT WAS THE IDEA OF ALL THOSE PEOPLE
They said one after another for centuries
THAT SEEK YOURSELF
Even Christ said know thyself
Muhammad Sahab said the same
Nanak saheb said The Same
But nobody tried to know that these rituals are not the end of life, they will not serve
a purpose and you have realize.
So those two ladies only got realization
And with I thought let's go
To seashore
About thirty people came with me
And they were talking in a very funny manner as to how
They can get Self-realization.
The don't deserve it,
the have not been good people
all kinds of things condemning themselves
and In that lot I got about twelve people altogether
inclusive these two ladies who got Realization
This is a sign that the movement of knowing yourself
it's very,very slow and people don't understand
why should they know themselves.
I was quite disappointed because nobody understood Me
but one day It so happened
That in One Of The Programs
One lady came, she was possessed and she started talking in Sanskrit language.
She just a maidservant
Everybody were surprised
And said you don't know who is
Then she started describing me from the Soundarela area
I wondering what's matter with this lady
Like man she spoke her voice like a man
People may believe it or not, but she was very possessed and then they started asking
her.
And them came to ask Me what She is saying that's true?
I said you should find out yourself because those days people were such if You tell
anything like this They would turn their faces only the kind of false gurus who
You give me five rupees, they'll be very happy that you can purchase the guru now.
They don't have to bother about anything."
We didn' t haveto do anythin'.
So with tha gradually it started working out
and I remember
these people who got Realization asked Me
that Mother will allow us to do Durga Puja?
Durgapuja was regarded as something
And the Brahmins were normally not ready to do it, because they were not realized souls.
So there used get into fits and all kinds of problems
so called the brahmin's seven of them
I told you just don't worry nothing will happen
because now you are facing the reality.
It's not some sort of a murti puja or anything,
it is human being – they were quite frightened and came down
but something happened to them with great confidence
They started all the mantras everything
The vibrations started flowing everywhere
Even we where very close to sea
I found that see was roaring
But people didn't understand, except for these seven people they said nothing happened
to us.
We did everything so well!
I think that was the first miracle of Sahaja Yoga – see
The trouble with human mind at this level or
At This Time is That They have too much
Of self-importance and they think no end
Of themselves So already they think we are great
What it there To know ourselves?
Because we know ourselves very well.
So the basic seeking power is humility, if you think that You do everything –you cannot
humble down andYou can not seek even If you see they don't want to follow anybody's
path They say We have our own paths will follow
our own path. We'll do whatever we want to, and like this I faced many people in different
countries who just came listen my lecture that's all but they wouldn't take realization
And some of them did take Realization, they got it but then lost.
Somehow this was such a funny story for Me that I am giving them Realization
and taking no money from it nothing –
i used to travel on My own
But despite That why is It
the people don't realize the value of Self-Realization?
Then a gentleman who got Realization in the first lot, he told Me this is – today it's
a consumer society as they call It whatever it Is that unless and until you take money
from them They will never value to You.
Let Them feel we have paid for Our Realization so at The Gate only We should keep somebody
To Take Money otherwise They Will not take to You.
I said but You cannot sell it!
falsehood. You cannot sell self-realization to people." He said, then you see won't
be successful with other gurus this is the main thing that they just accept
even when I tell them bring so much money do as there's a fees and
thats how only their ego is satisfied
and people take to false people.
This falsehood they may realize later on
because the suffer a lot
with all kinds of physical mental problems,
but by that time there are gone cases
Now this Sahastrara has not been yet described
in any one other books
though we have talked about it
In our ancient book in India also
They have talked about Sahasrara, but nobody has described it except that is one thousand
petals.
At least if they had mentioned something about It would've been easier for Me to
show them see this Is written in the book because people are like That!
It has to be written in some book, and that only they accept.
Very difficult situation because nobody had given a collective realization so
Nobody Had Written To That Extent except for one or two people who wrote
Clearly About Kundalini but I will say it was So Clear Because
It Was All In Poetry
So people would sing the songs, but they would not understand.
But I was thinking how these people who are lost
here and there under some sort of a seeking
what will happen to them
And How Will i be able To give Them Self-realization
Experiences were so horrid
that doesn't matter
I went on and on, and worked it out.
Of course we met some people who were also very cruel
nasty – who troubled Me
and troubled Sahaja Yogis
All these things should have really dampened my enthusiasm
but on the contrary
i started thinking why? Why are People like this?
Then realized one thing
that we cannot have the whole world to get Self-realization.
This is The Last Judgment,
at this time people
will decide what's most important thing
they'll know themselves
and understand
it not just having a big number
but really solid Sahaja Yogis
Then I found there were people who got cured of many diseases, but most them lost.
Some of the drug addicts gave up drug addiction – drinking they give it up and smoking
they give-up…
I never said a word that you give up this or give up that.
Once the Kundalini rises, they will automatically give-up
and it happened
And thats how people became so clean
So beautiful
started enjoying their life
But nobody would believe them
When went round to talk with other people
They say oh! You have gone mad
They couldn't believe how they have stopped drinking,
How are not smoking.
Then we want to drink!
What is this?
See so the identification I found
of these people were mostly
with a very loose type
Of enjoyment
The enjoyed very lose type
which had nothing do it spirit
Gradually of course it started working out, but still I must say that we can't expect
in this Kali Yuga to have billions and millions people in Sahaja Yoga though its my desire
is your desire.
And you want them get their Self-realization by which so many good things happen firstly
your physical self improves. Many people have been cured, Christ cured only twenty-one
people but I don't know how many thousands had been cured with Sahaja Yoga? Also there's
another very big problem in human beings that they read all kinds of books and they
They have no clear-cut idea as to what they should find,
What is their seeking.
It's a very big problem and whatever
Is in one book will try follow that
I mean like there shifting type of people
The shift from 1to another
And then progress in Sahaja Yoga
Is much more difficult
Very difficult
Because if you are going on one path
and you start shifting from one to another,
You may go back.
But in that they find it is their freedom
actually without realization
–you don't have your freedom of anything!
Freedom
Is that which
…You know what you are
—you're capable of
In the freedom
...you should receive all blessings
If these blessings arenot there then you'rre not free
There's something wrong somewhere in your own life, because once you get Realization
You become absolutely free people.
Free means Your Own Spirit guides you – the spirit as we know is a reflection of The
Divine God Almighty!
If everybody has the same reflection and is awakened, then in awareness it works as if
they know what's right or wrong.
What is constructive?
And what destructive?
It isn't some sort of a false satisfaction that you have but in reality you feel
reality and that is what it has to happen.
The first thing in Sahaja Yoga, you get the experience of feeding the spandha – the
cool breeze on your fingertips without the experience we should not believe anything
That means a new dimension has come now in your nerves, that you can feel the system
which had been not known to you.
Sympathetic nervous-system was there but
You never knew how it is working
The knowledge about yourself
was so poor, but after Realization suddenly the whole thing got enlightened.
Suddenly you started feeling it – the newness among us!
Still sometimes we have to fight your ego
You've get over ignorance of things
because Realization gives absolute knowledge
Absolute Knowledge
It cannot be challenged
It's single, as they call it, ekam eva satya and when you get that knowledge then
You can tally it also.
We find out if is correct or not this is something
That has happened to all of us
And we have already got those vibrations with which
can feel. For example, there may be some dissatisfied souls with Sahaja Yoga but you
find out on vibrations who are those people and what they're doing? On vibrations
Because you can make out if those people have reached that state of reality or not.
You can make out, these are the kind who try to oppose and tell something else – how
far they're going?
On your fingertips this is what is kiyama about which Mohammed Sahab has said it.
The other day, I must tell you an experience where there was one fellow who came from the
television and known as Star.
And he started asking Me very funny questions which had no relevance – his name
Abbas so…
So I said,"Abbas Mian!
You are wasting your time in my
times will come to right question?"
So he said, I am against all fundamentalism.
But i'm not fundamentally.
How do you know that or no?
so He said
,I' m trying to find out alright
as if You put your hands towards Me
Now Mohammed Sahab has said
at the time of Kiyama Your Hands will speak
and it'll be amazing immediately started
feeling cool breeze on his hand
is what's happening to me
I said, that's not it.
No use arguing – no us talking about him!
No use inquiring… just see yourself the experiencer!"
He got so stunned and after whatever he talked to Me never published.
So what am saying is if people reach The Truth
And they know this is the truth, nothing can change them if
They have reached the program center.
You see in life of all great people that
That think it's a truth not by just reading or
Not believing but as an experience
That on their central nervous system
they can feel the truth, then it is impossible to change them.
Like you see a seed becomes tree
and we cannot make that into a seed
Seed as a seed
but when the seeds changes in to a tree
than he could not bring back to the seed
It may create more seeds
So same way once your got your realization
And once you have become one with the Divine, then there is no question of your going down
unless and until yourself want to go down.
It's very remarkable how get this property –
How do we get these abilities?
And this capability
After that if don't lose it
Of course first you must grow
And for that you have to meditate, but this meditation once
You do it the whole being itself gets so enlightened and
So beautiful. ThatYou don't want
To change It,you
Wanted be there
An enjoy it forever
But of course
We wanted give
Its others because
You see you are enjoying
so much. Like on the street you find somebody starving and
You are very full, then
Then feel like giving food to that person in
The same way
In this world people are madly seeking running up
And down doing all kinds of things they want
To tell them
They may believe or not believe
They may try to sort of absolutely deny, defy – also defile you.
You can do anything but if know for definite that
YOU are on the right path, you're in the
right state or mind which is a Sahaja State
In Sanskrit it's called sahajavastha
Sahaja Vasta, in sahaj avastha you do not react.
You just see and appreciate it now I came
saw this beautiful such an idea of Sosrara
all the chakras they have crossed over
gone up there
And from their very good expression
but any other person would say
Oh! This color combination is so good
Why did They use these
why don't they use something else, like that you see finding faults with others and this
finding fault actually comes from your brain which is not yet enlightened.
You cannot enjoy anything because you react all the time you go on reacting if somebody
says some thing nice still we are reacting it's something bad of course we're
No question.
So, for us to understand that we are not free
To react
We're Not that cheap
To react
Yeah
On a very high pedestal
What is our job?
Is to enjoy
Enjoy everything
And That enjoyment
It's the blessing
Of The Divine
Even you can enjoy
The turmoil, the torture – everything you can enjoy if see to point that nothing
happen in your spirit which is a real light.
Whatever may suffer whatever think it's troubling you actually this silent light
of the Spirit makes you absolutely, perfectly joyous.
And You give Joy to others
–you don't design it
or plan how To Give Joy
but You just automatically give Joy
and this giving Joy
is also effortless
surge
because here in the Sahaja state
In the Sahaj state
You just see things, it's a drama you feel.
It is different styles and types that you can watch
And get the joy out of them
Its not important to say I like this ,Ilikethat
No! That I which likes is nothing but ego
and keeps you out of the enjoyment which is reality,
it's real.
Everything in this world that
You find is troublesome
if We see from another angle
from a sahaja sthiti
we won't feel troubles
but higher life should be there
That high standard
Should built-in within you
The other day I had a meeting with the bureaucrats and
And,I told them that pay is less.
You may think others get much more paid
They are having many facilities
But there's one way you can really enjoy your work
If have patriotism
Desha bhakti
if you have patriotism for country
No amount of sacrifice will satisfy
You want to give everything, and you can go through all kinds of so-called dearth
or depressive states without even feeling anything at the same time
your feelings become very deep.
For example
we are travelling
and suddenly you find somebody who is sick.
You can feel it on your vibrations that this person
And immediately,
Your sympathy
& your love flows to
That person
.You try
To help
That person
If possible
,you
Try
Even
Cure
That person
Just like
You see, the whole being becomes like an ocean which absorbs all rivers and all kinds of
watery things whatever it is within its abdomen I should say.
It just takes all that's there – but doesn't hurt you or trouble him!
He's like an over-powering person with his love.
he doesn't show His power,
and he does not bother about self-importance
If somebody tries to insult you
what is there the insult part of it?
And such people who have reached that Sahaja Avastha
are greatest creators in art
music
great thoughts
And that's why these survive.
So many people write, but it goes out
so may people create
But nobody bothers
Those who are realized soul
whatever they created is of eternal nature
Because there now in the ocean
Of eternity
They're on an ocean
purity, where there is no idea at all of hurting anyone or troubling anyone.
Such a protection in their for them they cannot be harmed because after
you are entered into the Kingdom Of God so who can dare harm
you or trouble, such a prosperity I've seen among Sahaja Yogis and such generosity that
they have.
And such understanding about things!
I don't have to give lectures, now – Don' t do this and don''t that, no?
And those who are not yet already matured in Sahaja Yoga should try
To mature.
Those Who Are Not Matured & Are Troubling
You Should Have Pity
Real Have pity for such people
That they're so immature
Today is something great, I feel because thirty years have been running up and down everywhere
–and i've be able to gather so many people.
There are some many Sahaja Yogis you see…
And also all over the world this just a wee bit of that!
So This Is Something was To Happen has already been described as being prophesied
by people, that such and such thing will happen.
That so many people get their Self-realization."
Unbelievable it was of course but as now you see how sweet is the feeling?
–that we are all one there's no quarrel or fight nor bad ideas
And nobody likes cheap things, they want to have something that is pleasing and has a
quality of understanding.
I've seen people becoming poets writing beautiful poetry –
i' ve see people become orators also
I have seen people becoming very good organizers, but one thing is
really important – the humility.
As said in beginning and again
what will appeal to you are your humility
You should be humble person
not think that something special
or not think that you are some sort of a, I should say self-important person.
Once your thing is very important then
You're part and parcel the whole if my one hand start thinking
I'm important it's stupid how can
One Hand be important all hands are needed
Everything is needed, legs are needed.
How can one part be so important?
If you start thinking like that anywhere
in your journey of Sahaja Yoga
then I must say You're not
In the Sahajyavastana.
So My own effort was
to takeYou into
That beautiful arena
Of Sahaja Yoga
where
you will be absolutely one with yourself,
One is the nature.
The people who are around You
With your own country and countries
everywhere...the whole atmosphere as they say
the whole Brahman becomes part and parcel of you
And we're not separated from that
Then there
We can see their egos
They call ninar, the egos of your being – of you life can be easily seen not in material
advancement or any other kind if a thing but in spiritual area which is highest.
Everywhere and every country there have been people with that quality and till today
they are all remembered.
In the same way, you all will be representing a very great knowledge about reality in your
life and creation or working.
Now only thing that we have to do is decide how many people are going to give realization?
What we can do for Realization, what should be done?
This is the only thing if you go on with your complete emancipation will be done.
You'll be surprised it's like time being a big mountain
but when have reached to peak
you can see everything very well and if he's so satisfied that
You are at the peak. So,that climbing part
even some ofyou have to do it. It is alright
there' s no problem .You must have respect for yourself
love your self an understanding
that we haveto reach the peak ,peak upthe mountain
And once you've reached the peak on the mountain
And then you start showering all your love, affection and everything that flows down the
mountain.
That is life for him – it's a greatest type of life!
Forget about other people politicians or others who were supposed to be great…
forget them!!
You are much higher than they because already chiseled like diamond with sahaja yoga
style of life, which is very satisfying and also
it's absolutely peace-giving. It gives you joy
,it give you peace .It gives you capabilities
so many things that cannot come like the thousand petals
of your Sahasrara which are enlightened
God knows what all can have with this
This is such a tremendous area you are in, the thousand petals.
And from there people have gained all their knowledge about science
– knowledges of…all great discoveries are form them
so this what one has to realize
ones own esteem
Self-esteem different
from self importance
You should have self-estime
With that you will become humble, you'll become very loving because your capable of
love.
And it is not forced one – I agree from the ocean clouds rise and then they give
rain but its in a cycle or life there are doing this…they're not conscious off
They don't think they are doing something right, because
there in the cycle.
You're out of those cycles and still you
all do work without any feeling
or self-importance
Your doing it becasue your have to
another cycle not a natural cycle
but an other cycle for awareness
where we aware as what you're doing
at same time very humble
You are very loving, you're very kind.
Don't shout and don' t beat anyone
.You do not say anything harsh to
anybody
And can manage
the most difficult person
If somebody tries
To be funny
Can always raise
The Kundalini
And be satisfied with it
if you secretly raise
The kundalini
Then other persons is finished
If you cannot raise it, then forget about him.
Forget that he is a difficult person – you know its like stone.
Now in the Stone what can we do?
You cant make it flow through love and dignity or these qualities
It's not possible from an stone hearted person
So forget this! That isn't your job at all
So I would request that first of all we should see how much humble
We are. You have to be very humble and
That is your decoration
And,thatisyourbeauty
so you have
Your love which
Is pure without any lust or greed
You love others only because you are in Love and then secondly,
your blessed with peace.
Your absolutely at Peace with yourself
And will be amazed with Peace, Wisdom will come into it
Will be regarded as the wisest man, wisest woman
Because we're at Peace with ourselves
Only in peace you can discover the truth,
You can discover every solution that we want.
We become very-very wise and sensible person
outstandingly great than others
–we are not like common general people–
then you have joy
Joy is something cannot express
in words, but still joy as I have told you many a times it is singular.
It's not unhappiness or happiness –
just joy! Just to enjoy everything
every company
Every incident
every scene
every happening of your life
You know how to enjoy
See? Joy has great capacity
Once I remember, I had gone with my son-in-law and daughter to see some historical place
– we have to climb a lot.
We were climbing for about three hours so naturally they all got tired
And there was little resting place made of marble
So he said let's spread out our Sahaja Yoga
So when I spread it out, you see they were so much saying why should we have come here
of all the things this and that.
They're grudging!
Then suddenly –you know?
This is a joy point- suddenly
I saw carvings of elephants
.So i said can u see these elephants
Everybody's tail
Is differently made
They said, Mummy how could you see the elephant's tails?
We are so tired.
I say do also just seeing that because this joy what it shifts,
shifts your mind from nonsense
You can't simply say its all non-sense
Just shift our minds
This is a way to get joy
and goes through things that will join us
Supposing there was person who quite boring
Then what happens, you just see the humor behind boring – how a person bores you.
And what we learn out of it is never bore anyone!
So this joy has specialty that teaches us
The essence of joy, if it's say a bad friend all right still you enjoy because see how
bad is.
Supposing off course its good friends then we can always see but do not go on with
your mind to criticize this criticism business goes out from the mind so what happens
Your mind shifts immediately from something that's ridiculous to
Something interesting in the same thing
So you don't criticize and
You, don't feel bad about it
Sometimes. It so happens
That people are amazed
That how i tolerate such
People well
I Don't all right time not being any attention whatever
The person may be doing if you
Are of that nature
That we call as a condition where, when you are absolutely in the turiya state.
So Kabir has said, jab mast huye fir kya bolhe?
When I have gone into that stage of joy why should say anything?"
It is like that – A temperament which You've to understand and respect it!
That is within you, but respect it.
Do not compare with others –
Others are no at your level!
So You're a different level
and just try to enjoy
Never feel that something higher or greater
No never feel
What we should feed?
The thankfulness
the fact
We have not mixed up
all those
funny ideas
And funny style of life
where you go on criticizing, this is not good. I don't like it!
Who are You?
We do know Yourself.
When we say that
and we're not knowing Ourselves
how to know what we don´t like?
I've seen people with very poor knowledge
who were just
going little bit here-and there
or very critical of others
but i dont'know the reason why
It is so, but may be that they think no end of themselves.
But this what very common – if you know the absolute knowledge then become really
humble absolutely humble and sweet gently kind
So today it's a great day otherwise for me also I didn't know that I will survive
so many years to see this beautiful day, because after all it was very hard life according
other standards.
But what is most joy-giving for me were creating Sahaja Yogis and listening them
And talking to them, the way they were so sweet and so kind
– I am so respectful.
All this has helped me so much
…and i must thank you for that
With your support
with Your help
...with You understanding
....I could achieve it
If I would have achieved on my own
..i will never asked
For This Help of Yours
But You are just like My hand
You are just like My eyes and I need you very much because without who,I cannot do it.
It's channelizing unless and until we have channels what is the use of being Adi Shakti
or anything how will you channelize?
If there electrical movement we'll need channels otherwise its a static thing in
In the same way I felt always that i needed more and more channels,
And when it worked out ,I was really in a very great spirit.
So thank you again for this day which has come
.and bless from my heart
That now take over responsibility
You are a Sahaja yogi
so have a responsibility also
to give Realizations, don't keep it to yourself.
This has be given for others and you can explain
You talk with them
You really very well understand
Try too
Understand then
Talked with him
And must give Realization
Otherwise
You won feel complete
Feel complete
You have do that
May God bless you all
